content: The aerospace company Airbus Group recently completed the first flight of a glider it calls Perlan 2. The Perlan Project intends to use gliders to take measurements in the stratosphere. Scientists believe weather in the stratosphere affects the Earth’s climate more than they thought before.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Cangarejo (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
